summary: Maeda has pivoted to a bullish outlook in his most recent video, explicitly claiming 'The Bottom Is In' and predicting BTC prices will move higher.
narrative: After spending late 2025 heavily shorting Ethereum and advocating for capital preservation, his latest analysis suggests the market has finally bottomed. He points to new catalysts like STRC and incorrect 4-Year Cycle frameworks to support his thesis that Bitcoin is now poised to move higher.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
